activeRequest: Release Stability Sprint Phase 2 (T-08): improve logging consistency/observability, token refresh reliability, and scheduler startup reliability
blockers: Residual risk: symlink privileged branch remains skipped on non-elevated Windows test runs.
Residual risk: Firestore user block-state writes use full-document semantics and may overwrite non-block fields on populated users/{user_id} docs.
Residual release risk: non-fcntl scheduler leader override can re-enable multi-leader execution if APP_SCHEDULER_NO_FCNTL_ASSUME_LEADER is misconfigured across multiple nodes.
notes: Release Stability Sprint Phase 2 completed: logging consistency updates in app startup path, token refresh normalization with expiration-aware handling, and scheduler leadership bootstrap on startup.
Focused Phase 2 validation passed: 27 tests passed across main startup, scheduler, and token refresh integration paths.
Adjacent token-service compatibility validation passed: 17 tests passed with one existing deprecation warning in async event-loop test helper.
Phase 2 hardening follow-up completed: relative-only persisted expiry now fail-closed and non-fcntl scheduler leadership now defaults to follower-safe mode unless explicit env opt-in is set.
Tester second-run peer review passed: focused 16 passed plus broader targeted 78 passed, with 0 failed.
Security follow-up returned conditional pass: expiry ambiguity closed and non-fcntl risk reduced with explicit deployment guardrails required.
QA final Phase 2 decision: conditional pass; phase complete for sprint execution with release-time guardrails.
T-08 marked completed in .github/TODO.md.
Release Stability Sprint Phase 1 completed: Firestore user block/unblock writes consolidated in FirestoreService and callers updated.
Focused Phase 1 validation passed: 42 tests passed, 0 failed.
Tester gate for Phase 1 passed in focused scope: 25 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped.
QA gate returned conditional pass for Phase 1 with follow-up recommendation for field-preservation verification.
T-07 marked completed in .github/TODO.md.
Track 1 runtime bundle completed for C-1, C-3 short-term, H-1, M-7, and L-3 with focused validation.
Dependency freshness/web vulnerability check completed with direct dependency minimum bumps and lock refresh.
Security hardening bundle completed with focused test evidence and no diagnostics errors.
Tester gate result: 243 passed and 2 failed (env-specific symlink privilege issue on Windows).
Tester implemented deterministic Windows symlink privilege-aware pass/skip behavior with focused security revalidation.
Final QA confirmed conditional pass for the completed slices.
Track 1 backend unresolved fixes completed with focused tests and no diagnostics errors.
Track 2 api-surface hardening completed with focused functional tests.
Track 3 platform runtime observability hardening completed with focused tests.
Track 4 security tail completed with focused tests.
Final tester gate passed (144 passed, 2 skipped, 0 failed).
Final QA returned conditional pass for Linux/TrueNAS target.
Documentation synchronization completed and aligned to verified implementation.
Open-point execution cycle is complete.
Tester and QA gates remain mandatory before closure for risky multi-layer changes.
